g.aria-label: X-axis titled 'Spend' for a linear scale with values from 20k to 180k
Y-axis titled 'Revenue' for a linear scale with values from 50k to 600k
Symbol legend titled 'Segment' for fill color with 3 values: Enterprise, SMB, Startup
Symbol legend titled 'Headcount' for size with values from 0 to 45
